trace.rationale: Historical patterns in similar esports matches show that both teams often secure at least one dragon by mid-game, especially in competitive series where Game 2 is critical. The 5-minute spawn interval and typical game length of 25-35 minutes provide ample opportunity for both teams to slay an elemental dragon, though early game dominance or snowballing can prevent one team from doing so.
Based on typical competitive play, both teams slaying an Entity J is moderately likely but not certain, given game dynamics and team strategies.
